location: Dropped by the Scaly Misbegotten boss at the end of Morne Tunnel, a small dungeon in the Weeping Peninsula.
tactics: Reach Morne Tunnel by heading west then south from the South of the Tower grace, past poisonous flowers, to the tunnel entrance; there's a Morne Tunnel grace once inside
You're automatically dismounted from Torrent inside — bring a torch for the dark sections, and expect regular Misbegotten and Miner enemies along the way
The boss telegraphs its axe swings heavily and moves slowly; jump attacks (especially to the head) interrupt it and can stagger it open for a free combo
lore: A corroded ship's anchor pressed into service as a weapon, its four sharp flukes equally good at stabbing as bludgeoning — a leftover from the vessel the Tarnished sailed in on, abandoned once they reached the Lands Between.

builds.name: Strength pierce build
builds.why: C/E scaling with an unusual Pierce damage type for a Greataxe, and pairs well with the Spear Talisman.

builds.name: Barbaric Roar aggressor
builds.why: Default Barbaric Roar skill for attack buffs, benefits from poise-stacking to trade favorably in melee.
